title: Phaseharness Context Config
description: Optional project-specific context configuration. Copy context.example.json to context.json to activate it.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor validation.

context-gather.description: Documents used by context-gather to extract task-relevant implementation context.

evaluate.description: Documents used by evaluate as code review guidance.

priority.description: required must be checked for relevance; recommended should be considered when relevant; optional is used only when clearly relevant.

path.description: Repository-relative path to a single document.

glob.description: Repository-relative glob for a group of documents.

description.description: What this document should contribute to the stage.

rules.description: Additional code review instructions to inject into evaluate. These are evaluation guidance, not phase-specific acceptance criteria.
